canonical_definition: A model alignment technique where a public model is fine-tuned to mimic the output distributions of a private model using a dataset of prompts and corresponding private model outputs.
papers: An Efficient Private GPT Never Autoregressively Decodes
Efficient and Privacy-Preserving Soft Prompt Transfer for LLMs
